current_plan: Re-run the current best code (LMP d1=4 through d8=65) without any changes to verify the 2800.0 result is reproducible and not just a lucky 10-0 sweep. If it scores 2800 again, we have high confidence the LMP tuning genuinely improved the engine. If it scores lower (e.g. 2625-2760), then the 2800 was variance and the true strength is ~2700. This verification run takes no risk and provides critical information about whether to keep iterating or stop.
